summary: The reproduction bundle builds Jackson core from source inside a JDK container and runs a proof program that feeds a deeply nested payload through the DataInput parser entrypoint with a much lower configured maxNestingDepth.
expected_security_impact: The proof program should parse a payload whose nesting depth exceeds the configured limit and print a bypass proof string instead of throwing StreamConstraintsException.
actual_observed_result: The reproduction was not executed on this host because no Java runtime was installed locally during triage. The Docker-based reproduction bundle was still generated for end-to-end execution from the final finding directory.
verification_method: The helper program configures maxNestingDepth=100, submits a payload nested 5000 levels deep through JsonFactory.createParser(ObjectReadContext, DataInput), and exits successfully only if the parser accepts the payload and observes nesting beyond the configured limit.
evidence_produced_by_run: Expected proof string on successful reproduction: EVOHUNT_DATainput_NESTING_BYPASS_CONFIRMED
limitations_or_blockers: A Java runtime was not available on the host during triage, so the reproduction bundle was generated but not executed here.
